name: Sweet Green Tomato and Corn Piccalilli
recipeIngredient: 1/2 each Red bell pepper, diced small
1/2 each Green bell pepper, diced small
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub tomato slices with salt and allow to stand overnight, covered and refrigerated.
2. In the morning, squeeze the tomato slices between layers of cheesecloth to remove excess moisture. Set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, combine vinegar, sugar, cloves, and cinnamon. Bring to a boil.
4. Remove from heat and add reserved tomatoes. Stir well.
5. Add remaining ingredients and mix thoroughly.
6. This piccalilli will keep, covered and refrigerated, several weeks.
